issues.description: Missing condition check: effect must verify that revealed card matches the chosen cost before executing KO and GiveDon actions. Current DSL has no conditional logic.
KO action is missing maxCount constraint. Text says 'up to 1' which requires maxCount:1 in the action.
GiveDon action incomplete: missing 'rest' effect. Text explicitly states 'rest it', requiring an additional Rest action or rest parameter on GiveDon.
Missing deck reveal mechanic: DSL lacks mechanism to reveal top card from opponent's deck and compare its cost to chosen cost. This is central to the card's effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Choose a cost and reveal 1 card from the top of your opponent's deck. If the revealed card has the chosen cost, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 3 or less. Then, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
